prompts.name: Best Quality
prompts.text: Prioritize best quality output with clean rendering, coherent detail, strong composition, and polished visual finish.

prompts.name: High Detail
prompts.text: Increase detail across the subject, clothing, environment, and materials while keeping the image readable.

prompts.name: Professional Finish
prompts.text: Give the image a professional finish with balanced lighting, refined color, clean edges, and strong presentation.

prompts.name: Masterpiece Quality
prompts.text: Aim for a masterpiece-level image with excellent composition, polished detail, emotional clarity, and strong visual impact.

prompts.name: Clean Render
prompts.text: Use clean rendering with crisp subject detail, controlled background information, and minimal visual artifacts.

prompts.name: High Fidelity
prompts.text: Maintain high fidelity in textures, proportions, lighting, facial features, and material behavior.

prompts.name: Premium Quality
prompts.text: Create a premium-quality result with refined styling, strong subject focus, and elegant image balance.

prompts.name: Sharp Focus
prompts.text: Keep the main subject sharply focused with clear facial detail and controlled depth of field.

prompts.name: Balanced Quality
prompts.text: Balance detail, lighting, color, and composition so no single element overwhelms the image.

prompts.name: Realistic Detail
prompts.text: Use realistic detail in skin, hair, fabric, objects, and light interaction without making the image noisy.

prompts.name: Visual Clarity
prompts.text: Improve visual clarity by keeping the subject readable, silhouette clean, and background supportive.

prompts.name: Polished Style
prompts.text: Polish the style so the image feels intentional, cohesive, and aesthetically finished.

prompts.name: Coherent Design
prompts.text: Keep all design elements coherent, including clothing, lighting, environment, pose, and mood.

prompts.name: Attractive Finish
prompts.text: Create an attractive final image with pleasing color, clear detail, and strong viewer appeal.

prompts.name: Gallery Ready
prompts.text: Make the image feel gallery-ready with refined composition, clean execution, and memorable visual quality.
